curation.synopsis: When a troupe of Harlequins — the masked, mysterious performer-warriors of the Eldar — discovers a dead craftworld drifting in the webway, they vow to find whoever was responsible and make them pay. Guided by their Shadowseer's ancient art, the trail leads to the Sable Marches, a lawless fringe realm of the dark city's kin. With several suspects among the gathered archons, the troupe resolves to draw out the guilty by staging a performance: the Masque of Vyle, a play designed to expose the truth and deliver a fatal reckoning. A standalone novella that plays like a grim carnival mystery.

flags.reason: sources describe the Harlequin troupe and its Shadowseer by role rather than by a confirmed proper name; left empty to avoid invention
